name: Neon Melancholy
summary: Lonely cinematic cyberpunk visuals with neon reflections, low-key lighting, and rain-soaked streets.

source_references.source_prompt: a lonely figure in a rainy neon city
source_references.user_note: preserve the wet reflections and lonely mood

style_profile.lighting: low-key lighting, neon rim light, soft bloom
style_profile.composition: wide shot, large negative space, centered subject
style_profile.camera_language: cinematic wide angle, shallow depth of field
style_profile.line_and_shape: clean silhouettes, soft edges, elongated vertical shapes
style_profile.detail_density: medium-high detail with restrained background clutter
style_profile.post_processing: soft bloom, subtle film grain, low contrast shadows

negative_prompt: overly saturated colors, crowded composition, flat lighting
